classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为完整图中绿色框标注的侧面视图，包含零件外形轮廓、孔/圆柱直径标注'Φ60'、'Φ55'以及长度尺寸'48'、'28.5'、'28'、'24'、'14'和'力测量原点'等尺寸引线，属于机械结构尺寸表达。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR detected only '8'; corrected to visible vertical dimension 48.
OCR detected only '5'; corrected to visible diameter callout Φ55.
OCR detected '60'; corrected to visible diameter callout Φ60.
Merged three OCR words into one label.

terminology_notes: Force measurement origin is treated as a datum-style label.
translation_notes: Side translated as side view contextually.

dimension_records.reason: Top horizontal dimension across the outer side-view feature.
Horizontal dimension below 28.5 indicating an intermediate top width.
Horizontal dimension between inner vertical extension lines at the top feature.

dimension_records.parameter_en: Vertical distance from force measurement origin to top mounting face
dimension_records.reason: Vertical dimension on the left references the labeled force measurement origin line.
Right-side vertical diameter callout is visibly Φ55, but OCR captured only part of the text.
Rightmost vertical diameter callout indicates the overall cylindrical outside diameter.
Independent leader label identifies the force measurement origin location.
Bottom horizontal dimension from the center reference line to the side vertical reference line.
Text is a view label, not a dimensional value.

frontend_table_records.parameter: Vertical distance from force measurement origin to top mounting face

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Side view shows top feature widths 28.5 mm, 28 mm, and 24 mm.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible diameter dimensions are Φ55 mm and Φ60 mm; vertical datum-related distance is 48 mm.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No explicit tolerances or material notes are visible in the accepted OCR annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为传感器正面测力面的机械结构视图，包含圆形轮廓、安装孔、螺纹孔、角度标注、直径尺寸如'Φ78'、'Φ69'、'Φ40'、'Φ38'以及公差和孔位说明，属于机械安装与外形尺寸信息。

title.title_zh: 正面测力面机械尺寸图
title.title_en: Front Measuring Surface Mechanical Dimension Drawing

records.translation_en_full: 6 x M4 threaded holes, roughness ▽6 (equally spaced)

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected OCR text 3-Cable to visible diameter cable callout Φ3-Cable; overlapping ocr_001 is a duplicate fragment.
Corrected OCR symbol C plus 78 to diameter callout Φ78.
Added visible diameter symbol to OCR numeric value 69.
Added visible diameter symbol to OCR numeric value 40.
Added visible diameter symbol to OCR numeric value 38.
Corrected OCR numeric angle 30 to 30° based on visible degree mark.
Merged diameter, tolerance and surface/depth-style symbol; corrected OCR noise for the symbol portion.
Visible callout is present, but available OCR source boxes are partial and overlapping; retained as low confidence.
OCR captured only part of the visible angle callout; corrected to visible 45° with low confidence.

terminology_notes: Diameter symbols were normalized to Φ where OCR detected partial or incorrect symbols.
▽ callouts were preserved as visible engineering symbols without reinterpreting their exact standard meaning.
translation_notes: Cable retained as English source text.
Chinese view context is summarized but not added as an annotation without a reliable OCR source in the provided list.

dimension_records.reason: Vertical callout identifies cable with diameter symbol and nominal size 3.
Horizontal dimension line over the top feature indicates a direct width dimension.
Leader points to the outermost circular profile of the front face.
Leader points to a circular feature associated with the mounting face.
Leader points to an internal circular profile.
Leader points to another internal circular profile close to the Φ40 callout.
Angular dimension arc on the left side indicates a hole-pattern angle.
Callout near the central hole combines diameter value, unilateral tolerance and finish/depth-style symbol.
The visible callout appears to describe two Φ4 holes with tolerance, but OCR sources are incomplete and overlapping.
Visible angular callout is present, but OCR captured only the digit 5, so confidence is low.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front face includes circular mounting features with Φ78, Φ69, Φ40, Φ38 and hole-pattern angle callouts.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Central/interface hole callout visible as Φ10 with +0.015/0 tolerance and ▽3 symbol.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Top feature width is 25 mm; cable callout is Φ3-Cable.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Cable exits from the side/top-left area and is labeled Φ3-Cable.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Some visible lower-right and left-side callouts lack complete OCR source coverage in the provided source list.

unresolved_items.description: Visible 60° angular callout appears in the drawing, but no reliable OCR source_id for the text is present in the provided OCR list.
unresolved_items.reason: Cannot create a final annotation without an existing OCR source_id.

unresolved_items.description: Visible 4 x Φ5.3 and 6 x M4 ▽6 lower-right callouts appear in the drawing, but corresponding OCR source_ids are not present in the provided OCR list segment.

Several OCR boxes such as ocr_004, ocr_005, ocr_006, ocr_008, ocr_009, ocr_010, ocr_013, ocr_014, ocr_015, ocr_016, ocr_019, ocr_022, ocr_025, ocr_026, ocr_027, ocr_028, ocr_031, ocr_035 and ocr_036 appear to be duplicates, fragments, or line/shape misreads.
unresolved_items.reason: Excluded to avoid duplicate or non-text engineering annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域和完整标注源图中对应黄色框均为'背面-安装面'的机械安装尺寸视图，包含圆形法兰轮廓、孔位分布、角度'30°'和'15°'、孔径'Φ50'、'2X Φ4'、'Φ10'以及'M5'均布孔深等尺寸和公差标注，属于机械结构尺寸图。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR '?50' corrected to diameter symbol callout 'Φ50'.
Merged count, multiplier, thread and depth/surface-style symbol fragments; OCR '√' corrected to '▽'.
Degree symbol restored from visible angular dimension.
OCR captured only '5'; corrected to visible angular dimension '15°'.
Merged split/overlapping OCR fragments; corrected '24' to 'Φ4' and '√4' to '▽4'.
Merged split/overlapping OCR fragments; corrected '?10' to 'Φ10' and '√2' to '▽2'.
Merged title words into one view label.

terminology_notes: ▽ is preserved as the visible drawing symbol associated with the callout.
translation_notes: Backside mounting translated as 背面安装视图.

dimension_records.reason: Leader points to circular hole pattern, indicating the pitch circle diameter.
Callout leader points to the four equally spaced backside mounting holes.
Visible angular dimension on the left side of the backside view.
Visible angular dimension on the left side; OCR only partially recognized the text.

dimension_records.reason: Leader points to two small holes; notation gives quantity, diameter, unilateral tolerance and ▽4 mark.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Backside mounting view shows 4 × M5 holes on a Φ50 pitch circle, plus 2 × Φ4 holes with +0.012/0 tolerance.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Φ50 pitch circle is visible; other envelope dimensions are not specified in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: OCR noise and duplicate fragments were removed; no additional unresolved dimensions from visible OCR sources.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示传感器或电机部件的三维外形结构，包括圆形法兰、圆柱主体、安装孔、顶面孔位和侧面接插件外形；结合完整标注源图可知该视图属于机械外形与安装结构图的一部分，未出现针脚功能、线色或接线表。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: No reliable visible text annotations in target crop; OCR detections are graphical features such as holes, outlines, and connector edges.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: No shaft/key textual dimensions detected in target crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: No textual envelope dimensions detected in target crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector is visible graphically but has no reliable OCR text in target crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: All OCR source boxes correspond to drawing geometry or noise rather than legible engineering text.
